# REQ-FR-260021: Adapter-Based Resilience for Data Model Evolution

- Class: FR
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-04-17
- Source decision: J3 (Data model evolution)

## Requirement

The frontend shall isolate backend schema evolution from feature UI logic through adapter-based mappings for atom metadata, bond semantics, nucleary structures, labels, and compatibility/error metadata.

## Rationale

Adapter-based decoupling prevents frequent backend model changes from cascading into broad UI rewrites.

## Scope Notes

- In scope for MVP: adapter boundaries for evolving model domains and stable view-model interfaces.
- Out of scope for this requirement: direct feature coupling to raw backend schema internals.

## Verification

- Code-structure checks confirm adapters mediate backend-to-UI model translation.
- Regression checks confirm selected model-shape changes are absorbed with localized adapter updates.
- Contract checks confirm feature interfaces stay stable under schema evolution scenarios.

## Traceability

- Related ADRs: ADR-260021
- Related backlog items: BI-260018
